steps.title: Identify the corresponding angle
steps.content: Triangle $RST$ is similar to triangle $UVW$, and $T$ corresponds to $W$. Therefore, $\tan W=\tan T$.

steps.title: Locate opposite and adjacent sides
steps.content: The longest side is $TR=477$, so it is the hypotenuse. For angle $T$, the opposite leg is $RS=405$ and the adjacent leg is $ST=252$.

steps.title: Compute the tangent ratio
steps.content:
Use opposite over adjacent:
$$\tan W=\tan T=\frac{405}{252}=\frac{45}{28}$$
The answer is D.
